title: Update module github.com/sylabs/sif/v2 to v2.24.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/sylabs/sif/v2](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif) | `v2.22.0` → `v2.24.0` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fsylabs%2fsif%2fv2/v2.24.0?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fsylabs%2fsif%2fv2/v2.22.0/v2.24.0?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>sylabs/sif (github.com/sylabs/sif/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.24.0`](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/releases/tag/v2.24.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/compare/v2.23.0...v2.24.0)

This release adds support for the `loong64` architecture.

#### What's Changed

- build(deps): bump github.com/google/go-containerregistry from 0.20.7 to 0.21.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​444](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/444)
- build(deps): bump github.com/google/go-containerregistry from 0.21.0 to 0.21.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​445](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/445)
- build(deps): bump github.com/cloudflare/circl from 1.6.1 to 1.6.3 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​446](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/446)
- build(deps): bump github.com/ProtonMail/go-crypto from 1.3.0 to 1.4.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​447](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/447)
- feat: add loong64 architecture by [@​linsein](https://redirect.github.com/linsein) in [#​448](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/448)

#### New Contributors

- [@​linsein](https://redirect.github.com/linsein) made their first contribution in [#​448](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/448)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/sylabs/sif/compare/v2.23.0...v2.24.0>

### [`v2.23.0`](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/releases/tag/v2.23.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/compare/v2.22.0...v2.23.0)

This release drops support for Go 1.24.

#### What's Changed

- build(deps): bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.9.1 to 1.10.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​430](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/430)
- build(deps): bump github.com/spf13/pflag from 1.0.7 to 1.0.9 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​431](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/431)
- build(deps): bump github.com/sebdah/goldie/v2 from 2.7.1 to 2.8.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​432](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/432)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.36.0 to 0.45.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​434](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/434)
- build(deps): bump github.com/google/go-containerregistry from 0.20.6 to 0.20.7 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​435](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/435)
- build(deps): bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.10.1 to 1.10.2 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​436](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/436)
- chore: bump golangci-lint to v2.8 by [@​tri-adam](https://redirect.github.com/tri-adam) in [#​440](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/440)
- chore: bump module to Go 1.25 by [@​tri-adam](https://redirect.github.com/tri-adam) in [#​443](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/443)
- build(deps): bump github.com/sigstore/sigstore from 1.9.5 to 1.10.4 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​441](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/441)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/sylabs/sif/compare/v2.22.0...v2.23.0>

</details>

comments.body:
### ℹ️ Artifact update notice

##### File name: image/go.mod

In order to perform the update(s) described in the table above, Renovate ran the `go get` command, which resulted in the following additional change(s):


- 4 additional dependencies were updated
- The `go` directive was updated for compatibility reasons


Details:


| **Package**                              | **Change**                                          |
| :--------------------------------------- | :-------------------------------------------------- |
| `go`                                     | `1.24.6` -> `1.25.6`                                |
| `github.com/sigstore/sigstore`           | `v1.9.6-0.20251111174640-d8ab8afb1326` -> `v1.10.4` |
| `github.com/coreos/go-oidc/v3`           | `v3.16.0` -> `v3.17.0`                              |
| `github.com/google/go-containerregistry` | `v0.20.6` -> `v0.21.1`                              |
| `golang.org/x/net`                       | `v0.49.0` -> `v0.50.0`                              |
These code changes are not urgent for us, and we don’t want to update to Go 1.25 yet. Compare #661.

### Renovate Ignore Notification

Because you closed this PR without merging, Renovate will ignore this update (`v2.24.0`). You will get a PR once a newer version is released. To ignore this dependency forever, add it to the `ignoreDeps` array of your Renovate config.

If you accidentally closed this PR, or if you changed your mind: rename this PR to get a fresh replacement PR.
